action.reasoning: Observation: iter 14 inspect_normalizer.py failed on .config, but we saw NormalizerProcessorStep attributes (stats, _stats_explicitly_provided) from previous inspect_preprocessor2.py output. We can likely override stats via preprocessor_overrides but not yet determined the exact key format. Given time pressure, we can skip manual normalization and rely on default (identity) normalizer; the model may still learn from raw LIBERO action scale. Decision: write full train.py with corrected nested observation format, preprocessor pipeline (no normalizer override), LoRA, and training loop. Run --test mode first to verify preprocessing and forward pass, then train 5 epochs on 200 episode subset. No eval submission this iteration; adapt predict.py with LoRA-loaded Pi0 agent next iteration after checkpoint is saved.
